data.speaker: kiki
data.text: Meow! While we ride, let's play Question Tags. If the statement is positive, the tag is negative. It's like a mirror, isn't it? Can you guess the tags?

data.speaker: polly
data.text: Before we guess the tags — the sentences on the roadside signs are WILTING! The verbs don't match their subjects. Tap the sick word to fix it first!

words.hint: Tag for: Manya is going to the village...
Tag for: We won't stay in town...
Tag for: You didn't pay the fare...
Tag for: Let us go for vacation...
